heading: Petitions by interested persons for standards and enforcement
label: 30162 Petitions by interested persons for standards and enforcement

children.text: to prescribe a motor vehicle safety standard under this chapter; or
to decide whether to issue an order under .section 30118(b) of this title

children.heading: .—Statement of Facts
children.label: b .—Statement of Facts
children.text: A petition under this section must state facts that the person claims establish that a motor vehicle safety standard or order referred to in subsection (a) of this section is necessary and briefly describe the order the Secretary should issue.

children.heading: .—Proceedings
children.label: c .—Proceedings
children.text: The Secretary may hold a public hearing or conduct an investigation or proceeding to decide whether to grant a petition under this section.

children.heading: .—In general
children.label: 1 .—In general
children.text: The Secretary shall determine whether to approve or deny a petition under this section by not later than 120 days after the petition is filed.

children.heading: .—Approval
children.label: 2 .—Approval
children.text: If a petition under this section is approved, the Secretary shall begin the proceeding promptly.

children.heading: .—Denial
children.label: 3 .—Denial
children.text: If a petition under this section is denied, the Secretary shall publish the reasons for the denial in the Federal Register.
